codeReview.summary: The commit performs a focused normalization pass across the three core platform contract slices (core-security-error.md, core-audit-runtime-settings.md, core-idempotency.md) and docs/INDEX.md. It replaces four stale 'deferred to a later integrating slice' references with proper bidirectional cross-links, updates two limitation items that are no longer accurate (audit coverage and runtime-gating details now point to the correct slice), adds the fail-open/fail-closed row to the reconciled contract table in core-idempotency.md §5.2, and refines the INDEX.md descriptions to identify slice ordering. All changes are docs-only, correctly scoped, and pass `ci/lint-knowledgebase.sh`. The three slices now read as one coherent canonical reference.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The core-idempotency.md §5.2 cross-reference table and §5.1 flow diagram are the canonical integration point for the three-part core platform contract. Future workers adding a new core contract slice (e.g., a fourth slice for observability or rate-limiting) should know to update these two sections in addition to the individual slice cross-reference tables.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: core-idempotency.md §5 contains the reconciled contract table and the flow diagram that ties all three slices together. The transcript shows the worker explicitly identifying this as the integration point.

summary: Pass. The finalize commit correctly reconciles cross-links, removes all stale 'deferred' references, adds the missing fail-open/fail-closed row to the reconciled contract table, and updates INDEX.md descriptions. All three slices now have complete bidirectional cross-references. The documentation reads as one coherent canonical reference for core platform contracts. No blocking issues found.
